diary_entries.entry: Another year. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. The colony feels hopeful. My improvisation grows stronger.
The crop_blight changed everything. I feel pragmatic about our future here.
Year 67 on Mars. Hydroponic crops show signs of blight. Morale is hopeful. We have 183 food units left.

meta_awareness: Ares-18 (year 67): 'I ran a sub-sim today and watched the tiny colonists deliberate. They seemed so real. Are we equally small to someone watching us?'
